questions.question: In 1987, Steve Martin starred in the movie Roxanne, a modern take on Cyrano de Bergerac. Who played Roxanne?
What advertising character for cereal was a vampire with a Dracula accent?
What song by The Knack was the number one song of the year in 1979?
In 1978, what name was chosen by the first non-Italian Pope in 455 years?
What phrase was trademarked by LifeAlert in 1992?
questions.answer: "I've fallen, and I can't get up"
